\"Record, when relevant, the start and t: "Rekhoda, lapho kufanelekile, lusuku lokuqala nolokugcina lobudlelwano." (ISDF 6.3) Ngeta lusuku ngendlela ofuna lubonakale ngayo ekhasini lokubuka lomsebenzi, usebenzisa izichasiso noma izimpawu zokubhala uma ufuna ukukhombisa ukungaqiniseki.
\"Use this note to record any other desc: "Sebenzisa leli nothi ukurekhoda olunye ulwazi oluchazayo olubhekwa njengolubalulekile kodwa olungangeni ezincazelweni zamanye amanothi." (RAD 1.8B21)
%1% draft(s) available (visit %2%newest: %1% okusalungiswa(s) kuyatfolakala (visit %2%newest additions%3% ikhasi ku phequlula them)
%1% upload limit of %2% GB exceeded for: %1% layisha limit ye %2% GB exceeded ye %3%
%1%Export initiated.%2% Check %3%job man: %1%Khipha initiated.%2% Check %3%umsebenti management%4% ikhasi ku landa the results when it has completed.
%open_strong_tag%Note:%close_strong_tag%: %open_strong_tag%Qaphela:%close_strong_tag% I-AtoM ingase isuse amaphakheji okukhishwa ngemva kwesikhathi ukuze ikhulule indzawo yokugcina. Uma okukhishiwe sekulungile kufanele ukulande ngokushesha ngangokunokwenzeka.
<strong>Label:</strong> Enter a name for:
Ilebula: Ngeta ligama lenkambu yesihlonzi esihlukile elikhombisa injongo nokusetshenziswa kwayo.
Isihlonzi: Ngeta ikhodi yereferensi yakudala, isihlonzi esihlukile, noma olunye uchungechunge lwezinhlamvu nezinombolo oluhlobene nerekhodi.
A coded designation for the copyright st: A coded designation ye the lilungelo lobunikazi isimo ye the intfo at the time the isitatimende semalungelo is lirekhodied.
A condition noma limitation ku the act.
A list of special chars, separated by co: A list ye special chars, separated by coma, ku be escaped ku string queries
A slug based on this name already exists: A slug based ku this ligama already exists so a number has been added ku pad the slug.
A slug based on this title already exist: A slug based ku this sihloko already exists so a number has been added ku pad the slug.
Add an alpha-numeric code to uniquely id: Engeza ikhodi enezinhlamvu nezinombolo ukuze uhlonze ngokuyingqayizivele le nqolobane ye-OAI ngaphakathi kwendawo yayo yenethiwekhi, ukuze kudalwe isihlonzi esiyingqayizivele esihambisana ne-OAI, isb. oai:foo.org:indzawo yekugcinacode_10001
Add container links (duplicate links wil: Engeza container izixhumanisi (duplicate izixhumanisi kuzoba ignored)
Add your digital objects by dragging and: Engeza tintfo zakho zedijithali ngokuhudula nokudedela emafayela endawo efasiteleni elingezansi, noma ngokuchofoza isixhumanisi sokuphequlula ukuze uvule isihloli semafayela sakho.
Additional information about the license: Ulwazi olwengeziwe mayelana nelayisense, njengabantu bokuxhumana, tinsuku zezenzo, noma izincazelo. Inothi lingabuye libonise indzawo yelayisense, uma itfolakala ku-inthanethi noma ifakwe ngaphakathi entweni uqobo.
All descendants or just digital objects: Konke descendants noma just tintfo zedijithali
Allow any valid URI PATH segment charact: Vumela noma yiluphi uhlamvu oluvumelekile lwengxenye ye-URI PATH ukuba luvele ku-slug, kuhlanganise nama-glyph e-UTF-8. Izinhlamvu ze-IRI ezikhawulelwe ( /?#{} ) nezikhala zangempela zizoshintshwa zibe amadeshi
An API key must be sent in the HTTP requ: An API key kufanele kube sent ku the HTTP request ZZZ header ku authenticate requests
An identifying designation for the statu: An identifying designation ye the statute. Use standard citation form when applicable, e.g. bibliographic citation.
Any field except finding aid text: Any field except ithuluzi lokutfola emarekhodi text
Kusebenza kuphela kumasayithi anezinqolobane eziningi. Uma kusethwe ku-"yebo", izinketho ezengeziwe zokusesha nokuphequlula zizotfolakala ezingeni lenqolobane
Are you sure you want to delete %1% and: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukususa %1% nakho konke okungaphansi kwayo?
Are you sure you want to delete the %1%: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukususa i-%1% exhunywe ku-%2%?
Are you sure you want to delete the find: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukususa ithuluzi lokutfola lika-%1%?
Are you sure you want to delete these ca: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukususa la magama-ncazo/imibhalo engezansi/izahluko?
Are you sure you want to delete this ref: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukususa lokhu kumelwa kwereferensi/isithonjana?
Are you sure you want to delete this rig: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukususa leli lungelo?
Are you sure you want to replace \"%1%\": Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukushintsha "%1%" ngo-"%2%" ku-%3%?
Authorized form of name - This is a mand: Ifomu eligunyaziwe legama - Le yingxenye ephoqelekile.
Basis for the permissions granted or for: Isisekelo sezimvume ezinikiwe noma sokuvinjelwa kwemalungelo
Bootstrap 2 themes have been deprecated: Izindikimba ze-Bootstrap 2 sezindala futhi zizosuswa ekukhishweni okuzayo. Sicela ucabange ukushintshela endikimbeni ye-Bootstrap 5. %1%Ulwazi olwengeziwe.%2%
Both source and replacement fields are r: Both umthombo futhi reindzawoment fields are kuyadingeka.
CSV Validator default behaviour when CSV: CSV Validator default behaviour when CSV Ngenisa is run
CSV validation initiated. Check %1%job %: CSV validation initiated. Check %1%umsebenti %2%%3% ku buka the results ye the validation.
Cache description XML exports upon creat: Cache incazelo XML exports upon creation/modification
Can be text value or URI (e.g. to Creati: Kungaba inani lombhalo noma i-URI (isb. ku-Creative Commons, GNU noma kwamanye amalayisense aku-inthanethi). Kusetshenziswa ukuhlonza isivumelwano sokunika imvume ngokuyingqayizivele ngaphakathi kohlelo lwenqolobane.
Cannot calculate accumulated dates becau: Cannot calculate accumulated tinsuku because cha lower level tinsuku exist
Cannot calculate accumulated tinsuku because this %1% has cha children
Check the %1% page to determine present: Check the %1% ikhasi ku determine present isimo. You can keep moving nodes if you don't reload the ikhasi. Once the ikhasi is reloaded, if a move umsebenti hasn't ended, your recent change(s) may not yet be displayed futhi okusha changes may fail. After the move umsebenti ends futhi the ikhasi is reloaded, the treeview kuzoba back ku a stable isimo.
Children inheriting rights from record:: Children inheriting emalungelo kusuka ku lirekhodi:
Choose the file format for generated Fin: Choose the lifayela format ye generated Amathuluzi okutfola emarekhodi (PDF noma 'Rich Text Format')
Choose whether permalinks for descriptio: Choose whether permalinks ye izincazelo are generated kusuka ku ikhodi yereferensi noma sihloko
Choosing \"Include descendants\" will in: Ukukhetsa okuthi "Ngeta okusezingeni elingezansi" kuzongeta wonke emarekhodi asezingeni eliphansi angaphansi kwalawo asebhodini lokunamathisela kulokho okukhishwayo.
Choosing \"Include draft records\" will: Ukukhetsa okuthi "Ngeta emarekhodi asalungiswa" kuzongeta lawo anesimo sokushicilelwa sokuthi Okusalungiswa kulokho okukhishwayo. Qaphela: uma UNGAKHETHI le ndlela, wonke emarekhodi angaphansi kwerekhodi elisalungiswa nawo azokhishwa, noma ngabe eseshicilelwe.
Choosing \"Include non-visible elements\: Choosing "Ngeta non-visible elements" will ngeta those not marked as Visible Elements.
Click 'Calculate dates' to recalculate t: Click 'Calculate tinsuku' ku recalculate the start futhi end tinsuku ye a parent-level incazelo. A umsebenti runs ku the background, accounting ye the earliest futhi most recent tinsuku across konke the child izincazelo. The results bonisa ku the Start futhi End fields ye the hlela ikhasi.
Click Confirm to delete this physical st: Chofoza okuthi Qinisekisa ukuze ususe lokhu kugcinwa ngokomzimba ohlelweni. Lokhu kuzophinde kususe indzawo yokugcina ngokomzimba kula marekhodi alandelayo:
Clipboard saved with %1% items. Clipboar: Ibhodi lokunamathisela kulondoloziwe nge %1% items. Ibhodi lokunamathisela ID is %2%. Sicela write this number down. When you want ku reload this ibhodi lokunamathisela ku the future, open the Ibhodi lokunamathisela imenyu, khetsa Load ibhodi lokunamathisela, futhi ngeta this number ku the Ibhodi lokunamathisela ID field.
Content in this area will appear below a: Content ku this indzawo will appear below an uploaded banner futhi above the isikhungo's incazelo areas. It kungaba used ku offer a summary ye the isikhungo's manlusuku, ngeta a tag line noma important ulwazi, etc. HTML futhi inline CSS kungaba used ku style the contents.
Creator: Umdali
DACS, 2nd ed. Society of American Archiv: DACS, 2nd ed. Society ye American Archivists
Date that the decision to ascribe the ri: Lusuku okwenziwa ngalo isinqumo sokuhlobanisa lilungelo nalo mthetho. Lokhu kusebenzela umongo wanoma yikuphi ukubuyekezwa noma ukuchazwa kabusha kwesikhathi esizayo.
Dates of creation, revision and deletion: Tinsuku ye creation, ukubuyekezwa futhi deletion
%1% layisha limit ye a okusha %2%.  A value ye "0" (zero) disables lifayela layisha.  A value ye "-1" allows unlimited uploads okuzenzakalelayo
Default publication status for newly cre: isimo sokushicilelwa ye newly kudaliwe noma imported %1% okuzenzakalelayo
Delete an existing %1% to reduce disk us: Susa an okukhona %1% ku reduce disk usage
Delete current rights in descendants and: Susa kwamanje emalungelo ku descendants futhi shintsha nge parent emalungelo.
Delete matches and replace with imported: Susa matches futhi shintsha nge imported emarekhodi
Delete matches and replace with imports: Susa matches futhi shintsha nge imports
Describe the nature of the relationship: Describe the nature ye the relationship between the function futhi the related resource. (ISDF 6.2)
Determines whether to show a link to the: Determines whether ku bonisa a isixhumanisi ku the phequlula hierarchy ikhasi ku the ulwazi tintfo phequlula/sesha pages
Determines whether to sort siblings in t: Determines whether ku sort siblings ku the ulwazi intfo treeview control futhi, if so, what sort criteria ku use
Did you follow a broken link?: Did you follow a broken isixhumanisi?
Digital objects with restricted access o: Tintfo zedijithali ezinokufinyelela okukhawulelwe noma lilungelo lobunikazi ngeke zikhishwe.
Display Privacy Notification on first vi: Display Privacy Notification ku first visit ku site
Display multiple linked digital objects: Bonisa tintfo zedijithali eziningi ezixhunywe nencazelo eyodwa yezinqolobane
Do not use any special characters or spa: Ungasebenzisi izinhlamvu ezikhethekile noma izikhala egameni lefayela - kuzolondolozwa kuphela izinhlamvu nezinombolo ezincane (a-z, 0-9) namadeshi (-). Ezinye izinhlamvu zizosuswa noma zishintshwe. Ukuhlela ligama lefayela ngeke kubuyekeze ngokuzenzakalelayo ezinye izinkambu.

Ungasebenzisi izinhlamvu ezikhethekile noma izikhala ku-slug - kuzolondolozwa kuphela izinhlamvu nezinombolo ezincane (a-z, 0-9) namadeshi (-). Ezinye izinhlamvu zizosuswa noma zishintshwe. Ukuhlela i-slug ngeke kubuyekeze ngokuzenzakalelayo ezinye izinkambu.
Dublin Core, Version 1.1. Dublin Core Me: Dublin Core, Version 1.1. Dublin Core Imethadatha Initiative
Editing the authorized form of name will: Ukuhlela ifomu eligunyaziwe legama kuzobuyekeza ngokuzenzakalelayo inkambu ye-slug uma ibhokisi elithi "Buyekeza i-slug" likhethiwe - usengayihlela ngemva kwalokho.
Editing the description title will autom: Ukuhlela sihloko sencazelo kuzobuyekeza ngokuzenzakalelayo inkambu ye-slug uma ibhokisi elithi "Buyekeza i-slug" likhethiwe - usengayihlela ngemva kwalokho.
Email your <a href=\"mailto:%1%\">system: I-imeyili your umlawuli wohlelo futhi request a larger layisha limit
Enable or disable the display of certain: Vula noma khubaza ukuboniswa kwezingxenye ezithile zekhasi. Ngaphandle uma zishintshwe yindikimba ethile, lezi zilungiselelo zizosetshenziswa kuyo yonke isayithi.
Enter free-text information, including q: Ngeta ulwazi lombhalo ovulekile, kuhlanganise nezichasiso noma izimpawu zokubhala zokukhombisa ukungaqiniseki, ukuze ushintshe indlela lusuku olubonakala ngayo. Uma le nkambu ingasetshenziswa, okuzenzakalelayo kuzoba iminyaka yokuqala neyokugcina kuphela.
Enter the ID of the saved clipboard you: Enter the ID ye the kulondoloziwe ibhodi lokunamathisela you would like ku load.
Enter the lilungelo lobunikazi lusuku lokugcina, if known. Acceptable lusuku format: YYYY-MM-DD.
Enter the copyright start date, if known: Enter the lilungelo lobunikazi lusuku lokuqala, if known. Acceptable lusuku format: YYYY-MM-DD.
Enter the email address(es) of at least: Ngeta ikheli noma amakheli e-imeyili okungenani omlawuli oyedwa wenqolobane. Amakheli amaningi angafakwa, ahlukaniswe ngamakhoma. La makheli azovezwa njengengxenye yempendulo esicelweni se-Identify.
Enter the end year. Do not use any quali: Ngeta unyaka wokugcina. Ungasebenzisi izichasiso noma izimpawu zokubhala ukukhombisa ukungaqiniseki. Amafomethi osuku amukelekile: YYYYMMDD, YYYY-MM-DD, YYYY-MM, YYYY.

Enter the end year. Do not use any qualifiers noma typographical symbols ku express uncertainty. If the start futhi end years are the same, ngeta data only ku the "Lusuku" field futhi leave the "Lusuku lokugcina" blank.
Enter the start year. Do not use any qua: Enter the start year. Do not use any qualifiers noma typographical symbols ku express uncertainty.
Ngeta unyaka wokuqala. Ungasebenzisi izichasiso noma izimpawu zokubhala ukukhombisa ukungaqiniseki. Amafomethi osuku amukelekile: YYYYMMDD, YYYY-MM-DD, YYYY-MM, YYYY.
Error: You must have at least one %1%Lev: Iphutha: Kufanele ukhethe okungenani %1%Izinga lencazelo%2% elilodwa noma ukhethe %1%Ngeta wonke amazinga encazelo angaphansi%2% ukuze uqhubeke.
Escape special chars from searches: Escape special chars kusuka ku seshaes
External URL to send clipboard contents: External URL ku send ibhodi lokunamathisela contents ku
Files not uploaded successfully. Please: Emafayela not uploaded ngempumelelo. Sicela retry.
Files successfully uploaded! Press the \: Emafayela ngempumelelo uploaded! Press the \\'Ngenisa\\' button ku complete importing these emafayela.
Finding Aid model:\n- Inventory summary::
Ithuluzi lokutfola emarekhodi model:
- Inventory summary: will ngeta only key details ye lower-level izincazelo
  (lifayela, item, part) ku a table
- Full details: includes full lower-level izincazelo ku the same format used
  throughout the ithuluzi lokutfola emarekhodi
Generate Finding Aid as public user: Khiqiza Ithuluzi lokutfola emarekhodi as public umsebentisi
Generate archival description reports as: Khiqiza incazelo yezinqolobane imibiko as public umsebentisi
Google Maps Javascript API key (for disp: Google Maps Javascript API key (ye displaying dynamic maps)
HTTP method to use when sending clipboar: HTTP method ku use when sending ibhodi lokunamathisela contents
Hierarchical list of menus for the site,: Hierarchical list ye menus ye the site, first column
ISAAR(CPF), 2nd ed. International Counci: ISAAR(CPF), 2nd ed. International Council ku Inqolobane yemarekhodis
ISAD(G), 2nd ed. International Council o: ISAD(G), 2nd ed. International Council ku Inqolobane yemarekhodis
ISDIAH, 1st ed. International Council on: ISDIAH, 1st ed. International Council ku Inqolobane yemarekhodis
If \"no\", just show one OAI set per col: If "cha", just bonisa one OAI set per collection
If job hasn't already completed, check %: If umsebenti hasn't already completed, check %1% ikhasi ku determine present isimo.
If no levels are selected, the export wi: Uma kungekho mazinga akhethiwe, ukukhishwa kuzohluleka. Ungasebenzisa okhiye be-control (Mac ⌘) kanye/noma u-shift ukuze ukhethe amanani amaningi kumenyu yamazinga encazelo. Kuyadingeka ukungeta izinga noma amazinga angaphezulu kwezinga ofuna ukulikhipha, kuze kufike futhi kufake izinga elisebhodini lokunamathisela. Kungenjalo, awekho emarekhodi azofakwa ekukhishweni.
If the finding aid is an uploaded PDF, t: If the ithuluzi lokutfola emarekhodi is an uploaded PDF, the transcript kuzoba kususiwe too.
If the page number does not exist, the d: If the ikhasi number does not exist, the derivative kuzoba generated kusuka ku the previous closest one.
If you are importing a SKOS file to a ta: If you are importing a SKOS lifayela ku a uhlelo lokuhlukanisa other than tihloko, sicela go ku the %1%
Ignore matches and create new records on: Ignore matches futhi dala okusha emarekhodi ku ngenisa
Ignore matches and import as new: Ignore matches futhi ngenisa as okusha
Import file initiated. Check %1%job %2%%: Ngenisa lifayela initiated. Check %1%umsebenti %2%%3% ku buka the isimo ye the ngenisa.
In the \"Action\" selector, indicate whe: Kusikhethi esithi "Isenzo", bonisa ukuthi ufuna ukuhlanganisa ibhodi lokunamathisela elilondoloziwe nokufakiwe ebhodini lamanje noma ukushintsha (ukubhala phezu) ibhodi lamanje ngelilondoloziwe.
Incorrect ibhodi lokunamathisela ID futhi/noma action.
It has %1% descendants that will also be: It has %1% descendants that will also be kususiwe
It has %1% descendants that will also be kususiwe:
It is not possible to select both digita: Akunakwenzeka ukukhetsa kokubili tintfo zedijithali nezintfo ezingezansi ukuze zikhishwe ngesikhathi esisodwa. Tintfo zedijithali zingakhishwa kuphela kumarekhodi asebhodini lokunamathisela.
It's used in %1% events that will also b: It's used ku %1% events that will also be kususiwe
Items per page can be a minimum of %1% a: Items per ikhasi kungaba a minimum ye %1% futhi a maximum ye %2%
Keep current rights in descendants and a: Keep kwamanje emalungelo ku descendants futhi engeza parent emalungelo.
Label: Ilebula
Limit administrator functionality to one: Limit umlawuli functionality ku one noma okuningi IP addresses, separated by semicolons.
Link multiple digital objects to a singl: Xhumanisa tintfo zedijithali eziningi nencazelo eyodwa yezinqolobane
Log creation and change of descriptions: Log creation futhi change ye izincazelo
MODS, Version 3.3. U.S. Library of Congr: MODS, Version 3.3. U.S. Library ye Congress
Make full width treeview collapsible on: Make full width treeview collapsible ku incazelo pages
Make it different from your username: Make it different kusuka ku your userligama
Make this selection the new default for: Make this selection the okusha default ye okukhona children
Merge saved clipboard with existing clip: Merge kulondoloziwe ibhodi lokunamathisela nge okukhona ibhodi lokunamathisela results
Move failed: new and old positions requi: Move kuhlulekile: okusha futhi okudala positions kuyadingeka as numbers
Move not allowed: log in required: Move not allowed: log ku kuyadingeka
Move not allowed: not enough permissions: Move not allowed: not enough izimvume
Move not needed: new and old positions a: Move not needed: okusha futhi okudala positions are the same
Name: Ligama
Name - A term with this name already exi: Ligama - A itemu nge this ligama already exists.
Name of the person(s) or organization(s): Ligama ye the person(s) noma organization(s) which has the authority ku grant izimvume noma set emalungelo imikhawulo.
No records were exported for your curren: Awekho emarekhodi akhishiwe ngokukhetsa kwakho kwamanje. Sicela %open_link%uvuselele ikhasi bese ukhetsa ezinye izinketho zokukhipha %close_link%.
Not a CSV file (or CSV columns not recog: Akulona lifayela le-CSV (noma amakholomu e-CSV awaziwa).
Note: Incorrect security settings can re: Inothi: Incorrect security tilungiselelo can result ku the AtoM web UI becoming inkufinyelelaible.
Note: While the date range update is run: Inothi: While the ibanga losuku uplusuku is running, the selected incazelo should not be edited.
Note: clipboard items unclipped in this: Inothi: ibhodi lokunamathisela items unclipped ku this ikhasi kuzoba removed kusuka ku the ibhodi lokunamathisela when the ikhasi is refreshed. You can re-khetsa them now, noma reload the ikhasi ku susa them completely. Using the sort noma print preview buttons will also cause a ikhasi reload - so anything currently deselected kuzoba lost!
Off - validation is not run before CSV i: Kuvaliwe - ukuqinisekisa akuqhutshwa ngaphambi kokungenisa i-CSV
On reporting, the system will return thi: Ekubikeni, uhlelo luzobuyisa le nombolo yemigqa
Oops, we couldn't find any %1 level desc: Oops, we couldn't find any %1 level izincazelo.
Oops, we couldn't find any physical stor: Oops, we couldn't find any ukugcinwa ngokomzimba locations ye the kwamanje resource.
PDF page number for image derivative: PDF ikhasi number ye image derivative
Please %open_link%refresh the page%close: Sicela %open_link%refresh the ikhasi%close_link% ku see progress futhi a landa isixhumanisi when complete.
Sicela engeza a lifayela ku begin uploading.
Please check one or more of the export o: Sicela check one noma okuningi ye the khipha options.
Please clear the application cache and r: Sicela usule inqolobane yesicelo futhi wakhe kabusha inkomba yokusesha uma ushintsha isilungiselelo sesihlukanisi sekhodi yereferensi.
Please configure your site base URL: Sicela configure your site base URL
Please log in to access that page: Sicela ungene ukuze ufinyelele kulelo khasi
Please rebuild the search index after up: Sicela rebuild the inkomba yokusesha after uploading diacritics mappings.
Please rebuild the search index if you a: Sicela rebuild the inkomba yokusesha if you are adding okusha languages.
Sicela rebuild the inkomba yokusesha if you are enabling/disabling Markdown support.
Provide a brief description of the menu: Provide a brief incazelo ye the imenyu futhi it's purpose.
Provide a link to an external website or: Provide a isixhumanisi ku an external website noma an internal, symfony indlela (module/action).
Provide a menu label for users. For men: Nikeza ilebula yemenyu ybasebentisi. Ezintweni zemenyu ezingabonakali (okungukuthi ezenhlangano kuphela), lokhu kufanele kushiywe kungenalutho.
Provide an internal menu name. This is: Provide an internal imenyu ligama.  This is not visible ku basebentisi.
RAD, July 2008 version. Canadian Council: RAD, July 2008 version. Canadian Council ye Inqolobane yemarekhodis
Record a citation to, and/or information: Rekhoda ukucashunwa kanye/noma ulwazi ngokushicilelwa okuphathelene noma okusekelwe ekusetshenzisweni, ekutadisheni, noma ekuhlaziyweni kweyunithi yencazelo. Ngeta izinkomba kuma-facsimile noma imibhalo eshicilelwe. (ISAD 3.5.4)
Record a citation to, or information abo: Rekhoda ukucashunwa noma ulwazi mayelana nokushicilelwa okuphathelene noma okusekelwe ekusetshenzisweni, ekutadisheni, noma ekuhlaziyweni kwezintfo ezichazwayo. Nikeza ulwazi olwanele ukukhombisa ubudlelwano phakathi kokushicilelwa neyunithi echazwayo. Lokhu kungeta izinhlelo ezinezichasiselo. (DACS 6.4.4)
Record notes on sources consulted in pre: Lirekhodi amanothi ku imithombo consulted ku preparing the incazelo futhi who prepared it. (ISAD 3.7.1)
Record specialized or other important in: Rekhoda ulwazi olukhethekile noma olunye olubalulekile olungahlinzekwanga yinoma yiziphi izingxenye zencazelo ezichaziwe. (ISAD 3.6.1)
Record the name of the register which gr: Rekhoda ligama lerejista ehlanganisa le nto yezinqolobane (njengezintfo ezibukwayo nezizwakalayo, umsindo, imibhalo yesandla nezithombe). Sesha ligama elikhona kumarekhodi erejista ngokuthayipha izinhlamvu zokuqala ezimbalwa zegama. Kungenjalo, cela ukuthi kudalwe ukufakwa okusha kwerejista. Umthetho we-NARSSA ka-1996
Record the name(s) of the person(s) who: Rekhoda amagama abantu abadale noma ababuyekeze incazelo, kanye nosuku lokudala noma lokubuyekeza. (DACS 8.1.5)
Record, as needed, information not accom: Lirekhodi, as needed, ulwazi not accommolusukud by any ye the defined elements ye incazelo. (DACS 7.1.2)
Replace existing clipboard results with: Reindzawo okukhona ibhodi lokunamathisela results nge kulondoloziwe ibhodi lokunamathisela

Require SSL for all administrator functi: Dinga i-SSL kuwo wonke umsebenti womlawuli

Izidingo: ifomethi ye-PNG, usayizi omkhulu 256K.
Izilinganiso ezinconyiwe zingu-%1%x%2%px; izonqanyulwa uma i-ImageMagick ifakiwe.
Review the current terms in the Levels o: Buyekeza amatemu akhona ohlelweni lwamazinga encazelo.
Saved clipboard maximum age (in days): Gcinad ibhodi lokunamathisela maximum age (ku days)
Search for an existing term in the place: Sesha itemu elikhona ohlelweni lokuhlukanisa tindzawo ngokuthayipha izinhlamvu zokuqala ezimbalwa zegama lethemu. Kungenjalo, thayipha itemu elisha ukuze udale futhi uxhume itemu elisha lendawo.
Select a date range to overwrite:: Khetsa a ibanga losuku ku overwrite:
Select a note type from the drop-down me: Khetsa a inothi type kusuka ku the drop-down imenyu futhi ngeta inothi text ku accordance nge RAD 1.8B1 through 1.8B6.

Khetsa a inothi type kusuka ku the drop-down imenyu futhi ngeta inothi text ku accordance nge the following sections ku RAD: 1.5E (Accompanying material); 1.8 B11 (Alpha-numeric designations); 1.8B9b (Ukunakekelwa); 1.8B7 (Hlelaion); 1.8B9 (Ngokomzimba Incazelo); 1.8B16b (Emalungelo).

Khetsa a inothi type kusuka ku the drop-down imenyu futhi lirekhodi, as needed, specialized ulwazi not accommolusukud by any ye the defined elements ye incazelo, including Ukunakekelwa (DACS 7.1.3), Citation (DACS 7.1.5), Alphanumeric designations (DACS 7.1.6), Variant sihloko ulwazi (DACS 7.1.7), noma Processing ulwazi (DACS 7.1.8).
Select the levels of description to be i: Khetsa amazinga encazelo azofakwa ohlwini lwezintfo. Uma kungekho mazinga akhethiwe, isixhumanisi sohlu lwezintfo ngeke siboniswe. Ungasebenzisa okhiye be-control (Mac ⌘) kanye/noma u-shift ukuze ukhethe amanani amaningi kumenyu yamazinga encazelo.
Set if you want to combine the current s: Setha uma ufuna ukuhlanganisa isethi yamanje yemalungelo nanoma yimaphi emalungelo akhona, noma ususe emalungelo akhona bese usebenzisa la malungelo amasha
Set the default view template when brows: Set the default buka template when browsing izincazelo zezinqolobane
Set the default buka template when browsing izinqolobane zemarekhodi
Set the upload limit for this %1%: Set the layisha limit ye this %1%
Show available drafts notification upon: Show kuyatfolakala drafts notification upon umsebentisi login
Site base URL (used in MODS and EAD expo: Site base URL (used ku MODS futhi EAD exports)
Skipping file %{fileName} because file s: Skipping lifayela %{fileName} because lifayela size %{fileSize} is larger than lifayela size limit ye %{maxSize} MB
Slug was adjusted to remove special char: Slug was adjusted ku susa special characters noma
Some files failed to upload. Press the \: Some emafayela kuhlulekile ku layisha. Press the \\'Ngenisa\\' button ku continue importing anyways, noma press \\'Retry\\' ku re-attempt layisha.
Sorry, this Term is locked and cannot be: Uxolo, leli temu likhiyiwe futhi alikwazi ukusulwa
Sorry, you do not have permission to acc: Uxolo, awunayo imvume yokufinyelela kulelo khasi
Sorry, you do not have permission to mak: Uxolo, awunayo imvume yokwenza ukuhumusha kolimi lwe-%1%

Strip file extensions from information o: Strip lifayela extensions kusuka ku ulwazi intfo amagama

Text describing the license or agreement: Umbhalo ochaza ilayisense noma isivumelwano esinikeze imvume, noma isixhumanisi sombhalo ogcwele ogcinwe ku-inthanethi. Lokhu kungaqukatha umbhalo wangempela welayisense noma wesivumelwano, noma ukubeka ngamanye amazwi noma isifinyezo.
Text or HTML to display when sending cli: Text noma HTML ku bonisa when sending ibhodi lokunamathisela contents
The \"<strong>%dd%</strong>\" placeholde: The "%dd%" indzawoholder kuzoba reindzawod nge a incremental number (e.g. 'image 01', 'image 02')
The %open_link%job management page%close: The %open_link%umsebenti management ikhasi%close_link% will bonisa progress futhi a landa isixhumanisi when complete.
The OAI-PMH API can be secured, optional: I-OAI-PMH API ingavikelwa, ngokuzikhethela, ngokudinga ukuthi izicelo ze-API ziqinisekiswe ngokusebenzisa okhiye be-API (abanikezwe basebentisi abathile).
The Title and Level of description value: The Sihloko futhi Izinga lencazelo values entered ku this ikhasi kuzoba applied ku each child incazelo kudaliwe ye the associated tintfo zedijithali - '%dd%' represents an incrementing 2-value number, so by default izincazelo kudaliwe via this uploader kuzoba ligamad image 01, image 02, etc.
The action which is permitted or restric: The action which is permitted noma restricted.
The beginning date of the permission gra: The beginning lusuku ye the imvume granted.
The character separating hierarchical el: The character separating hierarchical elements ku a ikhodi yereferensi
The clipboard is empty for this entity t: Ibhodi lokunamathisela alinalutho ngalolu hlobo lwebhizinisi.
The code can only contain letters and nu: The code can only contain letters futhi numbers
The country or other political body that: The izwe noma other political body that has enacted the statute.
The izwe whose lilungelo lobunikazi laws apply.
The current version of the application: The kwamanje version ye the application
The lusuku the lilungelo lobunikazi isimo applies.
The ending date of the permission grante: The ending lusuku ye the imvume granted. Omit lusuku lokugcina if the ending lusuku is unknown.
The existing term values are required by: The okukhona itemu values are kuyadingeka by the application ku operate correctly
The following file will be deleted from: The following lifayela kuzoba kususiwe kusuka ku the lifayela system:
The maximum disk space of %1% GB availab: The maximum disk space ye %1% GB kuyatfolakala ye uploading tintfo zedijithali has been reached. Sicela contact your AtoM umlawuli wohlelo ku increase the kuyatfolakala disk space.
The maximum disk space ye %1% GB kuyatfolakala ye uploading tintfo zedijithali has been reached. Sicela contact your umlawuli wohlelo ku increase the kuyatfolakala disk space.
The maximum number of pixels on the long: The maximum number ye pixels ku the longest edge ye derived reference images.
The number of days a saved clipboard sho: The number ye days a kulondoloziwe ibhodi lokunamathisela should be retained before it is eligible ye deletion
The number of entities to include in a s: The number ye entities ku ngeta ku a single OAI response list before inserting a resumption token
The number of records shown per page on: The number ye emarekhodi shown per ikhasi ku list pages
The pdfinfo tool is required to use this: The pdfinfo tool is kuyadingeka ku use this functionality. Sicela contact your umlawuli wohlelo.
The related object(s) will <strong>not</: The related intfo(s) will not be kususiwe
The system is currently in read-only mod: The system is currently ku read-only mode. Sicela try again later.
The upload limit of %1% GB for <a href=\: The layisha limit ye %1% GB ye %3% has been exceeded (%4% GB currently used)
The layisha limit ye %1% GB ye %3% has been reached
The uploads directory has not been creat: The uploads directory has not been kudaliwe yet.
The username or e-mail address you enter: The userligama noma e-mail ikheli you entered is already ku use
There was an error loading the clipboard: Kube nephutha ekulayisheni okuqukethwe kwebhodi lokunamathisela.
This feature will not work until a Googl: This feature will not work until a Google Maps API key is specified ku the %1%global%2% tilungiselelo ikhasi.
This is a non-preferred term and cannot: This is a non-preferred itemu futhi akukwazi ukuba edited - sicela use %2%.
This is an auto-generated setting that p: This is an auto-generated setting that produces an OAI compliant inqolobane yemarekhodi isihlonzi, which includes the OAI inqolobane yemarekhodi code value if it is set
This is an example of the auto-generated: This is an example ye the auto-generated, OAI compliant isihlonzi which is kudaliwe ye each item ku this particular OAI inqolobane yemarekhodi
This isn't a valid email address: This isn't a valid i-imeyili ikheli
This term is used in %1% records. The te: This itemu is used ku %1% emarekhodi. The itemu kuzoba kususiwe kusuka ku these emarekhodi.
Lo msebenzisi unamanothi angu-%1% ohlelweni. La manothi ngeke asuswe, kodwa ukuhlobana kwawo nalo msebenzisi kuzosuswa.

This value cannot be more than %max%: This value akukwazi ukuba okuningi than %max%
This value must be at least %min%: This value kufanele kube at least %min%
This value must be at least %min% pixels: This value kufanele kube at least %min% pixels

Update matches ignoring blank fields in: Uplusuku matches ignoring blank fields ku CSV
Updating an existing date range will per: Updating an okukhona ibanga losuku will permanently overwrite the kwamanje tinsuku.
Upload limit of %{maxPostSize} MB reache: Layisha limit ye %{maxPostSize} MB reached. Unable ku engeza additional emafayela.
Upload multi-page files as multiple desc: Layisha multi-ikhasi emafayela as multiple izincazelo
Uploaded finding aid could not be moved: Layishaed ithuluzi lokutfola emarekhodi could not be moved ku the downloads
Use any valid URI path segment and upper: Use any valid URI indlela segment futhi uppercase character ku slugs
Use the actor name field to link an auth: Sebenzisa inkambu yegama lomlingisi ukuxhumanisa lirekhodi legunya nale ncazelo. Sesha ligama elikhona kumarekhodi egunya ngokuthayipha izinhlamvu zokuqala ezimbalwa zegama. Kungenjalo, thayipha ligama elisha ukuze udale futhi uxhume lirekhodi legunya elisha.
Use these options to specify how the dat:
Use these options ku specify how the ibanga losuku returns results. "Exact" means
that the start futhi end tinsuku ye izincazelo returned kufanele fall entirely within
the ibanga losuku entered. "Overlapping" means that any incazelo whose start noma
end tinsuku touch noma overlap the target ibanga losuku kuzoba returned.
Use this interface to update the authori: Use this interface ku uplusuku the ifomu eligunyaziwe legama, slug (permalink), futhi/noma %1% fileligama.
Use this interface to update the descrip: Use this interface ku uplusuku the incazelo sihloko, slug (permalink), futhi/noma %1% fileligama.
Buka the full list ye descendants.
We couldn't find any results matching yo: We couldn't find any results matching your sesha.
We've redirected you to the first page o: We've redirected you ku the first ikhasi ye results. To avoid using vast amounts ye memory, AtoM limits pagination ku %1% emarekhodi. Sicela, narrow down your results.

We've redirected you ku the first ikhasi ye results. To avoid using vast amounts ye memory, AtoM limits pagination ku %1% emarekhodi. To buka the last emarekhodi ku the kwamanje result set, try changing the sort direction.
When disabled: Finding Aid links are not:
When disabled: Ithuluzi lokutfola emarekhodi izixhumanisi are not displayed, Ithuluzi lokutfola emarekhodi generation is
disabled, futhi the 'Advanced Sesha > Ithuluzi lokutfola emarekhodi' filter is hidden.
When enabled the following text will app: When enabled the following text will appear ku the %1% imethadatha section ku describe how a umsebentisi may kufinyelela the original futhi ukulondoloza copy ye the lifayela stored ku a linked yedijithali ukulondoloza system. The text appears ku the "Izimvume" field. When disabled, the "Izimvume" field is not displayed.

When enabled the following text will appear whenever a umsebentisi tries ku landa a %1% master nge an associated isitatimende semalungelo where the Basis = lilungelo lobunikazi futhi the Ukuvinjelwa = conditional. You can style futhi customize the text as ku a static ikhasi.
When enabled, an &quot;Upload limit&quot: When enabled, an "Layisha limit" meter is displayed ye authenticated basebentisi ku the %1% buka ikhasi, futhi administrators can limit the disk space each %1% is allowed ye %2% uploads
When enabled, the copyright pop-up will: When enabled, the lilungelo lobunikazi pop-up kuzoba applied ku every %1%, regardless ye whether there is an accompanying Isitatimende semalungelo.
When set to &quot;no&quot;, the reposito: When set ku "cha", the inqolobane yemarekhodi ligama is excluded kusuka ku certain displays because it kuzoba too repetitive
When set to &quot;yes&quot;, the referen: When set ku "yebo", the ikhodi yereferensi string kuzoba built using the ulwazi intfo isihlonzi plus the izihlonzi ye konke its ancestors
When set to 'yes' generated Finding Aids: When set ku 'yebo' generated Amathuluzi okutfola emarekhodi will khipha Drafts
You can check %1% page to determine the: You can check %1% ikhasi ku determine the kwamanje isimo ye the uplusuku umsebenti.
You cannot show more than %max% hits per: You cannot bonisa okuningi than %max% hits per ikhasi
You may only clear jobs belonging to you: You may only clear imisebenti belonging ku you.
You must show at least %min% hits per pa: You kufanele bonisa at least %min% hits per ikhasi
You will also be able to review and indi: You will also be able ku review futhi individually modify each incazelo sihloko ku the next ikhasi after clicking "Layisha."
Your %entity_type% export package is bei: Your %entity_type% khipha package is being built.
Your browser does not support JavaScript: Isiphequluli sakho asisekeli i-JavaScript. Bona %1%izidingo ezincane%2%.
Your description has been updated. Lower: Your incazelo has been kubuyekeziwe. Lower level izincazelo are being kubuyekeziwe now – check the umsebenti scheduler ikhasi ye isimo futhi details.
Your edits to this description have been: Ukuhlela kwakho kule ncazelo kulondoloziwe futhi incazelo ibuyele esimweni sokusalungiswa. Sicela ucele umsebentisi onezimvume ezanele ukuthi aphinde ashicilele incazelo ukuze ibonakale emphakathini.
Your password confirmation did not match: Ukuqinisekiswa kwephasiwedi yakho akufananga nephasiwedi yakho.
Your term has been updated. Its related: Your itemu has been kubuyekeziwe. Its izincazelo ezihlobene are being kubuyekeziwe asynchronously – check the umsebenti scheduler ikhasi ye isimo futhi details.
